description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs: host-auth and password-auth, both using the postgres Docker image and a postgres service. Define variables POSTGRES_DB=custom_db, POSTGRES_HOST_AUTH_METHOD=trust, POSTGRES_USER=custom_user for host-auth, and POSTGRES_DB=custom_db, POSTGRES_PASSWORD=custom_pass, POSTGRES_USER=custom_user for password-auth. In the host-auth job run the script `psql -h "postgres" -U "$POSTGRES_USER" -d "$POSTGRES_DB" -c "SELECT 'OK' AS status;"`. In the password-auth job first export PGPASSWORD=$POSTGRES_PASSWORD then run the same psql command. Both jobs run in the default test stage.
